title: HotbarCycle
body:
# HotbarCycle
---

### 📖 About

Adds Stardew Valley-inspired hotbar cycling to navigate your inventory without ever opening it!

 
This mod adds 2 new keybinds:

- Swap Hotbar (Default 'H'):
    - Shifts all your inventory rows downwards, allowing you to cycle through each row.
- Swap Slot (Default 'J'):
    - Shifts a single column of your inventory downwards (the hotbar slot you have selected)

**Additionally, there is Hold-and-Scroll mode:**
Instead of clicking a keybind to cycle the hotbar/slot, hold the button and use your scroll-wheel to cycle!

There are also config options for reversing the cycle order, enabling sounds, and enabling individual rows/columns for cycling through mod menu + cloth config.

---

### 💡 Installation
**This mod requires Fabric API!** Get it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

*This mod is client-side!* It will work on any server you join even if the server doesn't have it.

In fact, installing this mod on a server will do absolutely nothing.
